name: Client 1927-1112
history: Strained relationships with parents and a history of feeling judged and disapproved of. Mother's health condition mentioned. Issues related to parental support during education. Mentions of the mother being described as 'broken' and allegations of a past affair.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must meet others' needs to feel valued.
intermediate_belief_depression: I am not good enough for my wife.
coping_strategies: Engaging in affairs to feel wanted and valued.
situation: Received a work bonus for exceptional performance. During a call with parents about the bonus, they asked about job prospects.
auto_thought: I am not satisfied with my marriage, but I fear losing what I have.
behavior: Contemplating and engaging in extramarital affairs.
